cities.name: Hydroponic Hall
cities.description: Tall glass planters climb the Atrium ribs; soft canopy light filters through leaf and cable while condensation beads on clean steel rails.

cities.name: Root-Cable Garden
cities.description: Rooted vines braid with power conduits across a mezzanine garden — green life and pale HUD glow share the same quiet aisle.

cities.name: Canopy Observatory
cities.description: A glass cupola opens above the Hab canopy; distant starlight mixes with soft grow-lamps and a pale spiral of condensation mist.

cities.name: Frost Glass Bay
cities.description: A wide bay of frosted panes overlooks stacked cryo tanks; pale cyan reflections slide across the floor like slow tides.

cities.name: Coolant River
cities.description: A luminous coolant channel runs between catwalks; vapor curls upward while instrument panels blink in soft ice-blue.

cities.name: Cryo Vault Terrace
cities.description: Sealed vault doors line a curved terrace; frost patterns bloom on metal while a quiet warning beacon pulses amber.

cities.name: Reactor Ring
cities.description: A circular reactor gallery glows with warm instrument amber; railings and conduits form clean geometric arcs under lab lighting.

cities.name: Plasma Conduit Walk
cities.description: Transparent conduit tubes carry soft plasma shimmer along a bright corridor — heat haze, not fire, under cool white overheads.

cities.name: Instrument Amber Hall
cities.description: Banks of calibrated instruments face a glowing core viewport; copper and amber readouts break the pale steel calm.

cities.name: Observation Spine
cities.description: A long spine of viewports looks into deep space; violet signal haze drifts past antenna lattices outside the glass.

cities.name: Void Dish Field
cities.description: Arrays of radio dishes tilt toward a starfield; soft purple HUD rings float above pale deck plating.

cities.name: Signal Mist Gallery
cities.description: A gallery of translucent panels fills with luminous signal mist; thin cyan vectors draw quiet constellations on the walls.
